title: vaseyanthus insularis
intro: Vaseyanthus insularis, also known as the Hawaiian ylang-ylang or fragrant tree, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vaseyanthus insularis include reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Vaseyanthus insularis typically involve infusing its flowers or leaves in water to create teas, infusions, or essential oils for medicinal use.
